rulings.Case Title: LEADERS IN COMMUNITY ALTERNATIVES, INC. VS. G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Pltf'S Third Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A; Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Demurrer To Pltf'S Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 12, 2010, line 11, DEFENDANT G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, INC. Demurrer To Plaintiff's Third Amended Complaint. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to the 3rd, 4th and 6th causes of action. The parties relationship was solely business competitors. Defendant owed no duty to plaintiff to support the negligent-based claims. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. The intentional misrepresentation claim (5th cause of action) is striken without leave to amend, as it was subject to demurrer in the first amended complaint, was omitted in the second amended conmplaint, and re-raised untimely in the third amended complaint. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT COPELAND VS. SPRUCE RESTAURANT, A BUSINESS ENTITY, FORM UNKNOWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Defts' Amended Answer To Pltf'S First Amended Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 12, 2010, line 3, PLAINTIFF ROBERT COPELAND Demurrer to Defendants' Amended Answer to Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint. Demurrer overruled in part and sustained in part. Demurrer overruled as to 1st and 2nd affirmative defenses. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 5th defense (adequate remedy at law) which is not a defense, but a factor considered by the court. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to remaining defenses. Waiver and estoppel are separate defenses, unclean hands and laches are separate defenses, all must be affirmed separately. Defenses must be plead with particularity and allege facts in support. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: EARL A LAWRENCE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 12, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MAYOR GAVIN NEWSOM DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend, no opposition filed. This lawsuit is an unlawful collateral attack on the rent board proceedings. The lawsuit is uncertain and states no claim against CCSF and Mayor Newson. Plaintiff did not file a government claim. No reasonable proabability that defects can be cured by amendment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: EARL A LAWRENCE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
